productDisplayName: Angry Birds Men Red Printed T-shirt
description: Style note We know how addictive the angry birds game can be! Tap into the season's most popular video game trend from your phones and PCs and into your wardrobe, with this soft spun tee from Angry Birds. The imagery is very in-vogue, channeling the spirit of urban chic into your off-duty ensemble.  Style this with your tried-and true favourite denims (rolled up to the ankle)  with boat shoes, or colour block it with another bright hue and add on a pair of ankle-high boots.Product DetailsRed round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and vivid coloured print on the chestMaterial and Care100% cotton Machine wash warm inside out with like colours Do not bleach or iron on print Dry in shade Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo ) is wearing size M
